expectations.text: behavioral_check: Explains that encoding_interval trains the place-field / receptive-field model; decoding_interval is where the trained model is applied
expectations.evidence: Encoding_interval: 'time window used to fit/train the generative model ... place fields / mark intensity functions ... occupancy'; decoding_interval: 'fitted model is applied to compute the posterior'.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Gives a same-interval use (within-run reconstruction) and a different-interval use (train on run, decode replay during sleep / reward)
expectations.evidence: Case 1 with both pointing at run epoch; Case 2.1 'Decoding replay during sleep / immobility / SWRs' with encoding=run, decoding=sleep/SWR/ripple times.
